entry.title: 资产以前年度多折旧了，怎么冲回？
entry.content:
资产701001854，2024年资产的摊销已完成，与实际情况不符，如何处理实现把以前年度多摊销的金额冲回？

SAP版本ECC770

entry.title: Company code 6151 is not permitted as the paying company code in FBZP Config.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have developed a new company code, Q951, with reference to coco 6151 as part of a rollout project in Switzerland. We are establishing a cross-company agreement wherein the bank account in 6151 makes payments on behalf of Q951 in accordance with business requirements. For the new Coco Q951, the paying company code will be 6151. However, please be note that although both coco are from Switzerland, their functional currency is different. The currency in Coco 6151 is CHF.The currency of Coco Q951 is USD.

 

Problem: When customizing in the FBZP transaction, error F3063 occurs. After reading OSS note 2257645, we now know that in order to establish cross-company payments, both COCOs must be located in the same country and bearing the same functional currency.

 

Why this ticket: We simply wanted to know if there was another way to get around this problem and develop the cross-company payment system properly. Alternatively, if this is an unchangeable SAP standard practice.

entry.title: Cost center company code change from LTIN to LTUD
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

While creating a cost center 494LE wrong we mapped to LTIN company code. Now need to correct it as LTUD. Still now no cost is booked in this cost center.  Kindly help us to correct it.

Regards,

Arun

entry.title: Item is blocked for payment
entry.content:
Hi Team,

For payment run using F110, we are facing the payment exception error as Item is blocked for payment and see payment block as C in the proposal, but no block is seen in document level and customer master also looks fine.  please find the below details. Attaching screenshot for your reference.

Run Id: US18J
Payment Run Date: 14.05.2026
 
Thanks, and Regards
Sri Nidhi Dokka

entry.title: FRB1 Value is not updating in ME21N - Standard PO
entry.content:
Hi, I am doing practice on a testing system as an FI trainee. In FI-MM Integration, I am facing a horrible issue which has taken my hours but I could not find to solve it. 

The issue is in ME21N - Standard Purchase Order.

 

 

The issue is that, FRB1 value is not updating. I have got into various configuration settings with the help of Gemini and the situation now is becoming more and more frustrating to me. 

Following are my few screenshots of configurations:

1) Define Condition Types - FRB1

2) Set Calculation Schema - Purchasing 

3) OBYC for FR1

 

I don't understand where the problem is. Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: DMEE Transaction
entry.content:
Hello Team,

This is regarding the issue where the user needs to populate both IBAN and Bank Account values in the DMEE transaction.

Specifically, in the path:
DMEE → PmtInf → CdtTrfTxInf → CdtrAcct → Other → Id

  • The IBAN value should be populated under Other → Id (when available)
  • The Vendor Bank Account should be populated under Other → Id (if IBAN is not maintained)

However, despite trying multiple conditions as per the below configurations, we are observing that the IBAN value is still populating in the IBAN field and the Bank Account in (Other → Id), instead of correctly populating both fields as required.

Could you please assist us in guiding on how to correctly populate:

  • IBAN in the Other → Id
  • Vendor Bank Account in the Other → Id field (when IBAN is not available)

Thanks

Pooja

entry.title: API Journal Entry - Post (Asynchronous) - additional Freely Defined Currencies
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to use the SOAP API service:JOURNALENTRYBULKCREATIONREQUEST_INfor FI journal entry postings. 

I would like to use it also to provide amounts for additional Freely Defined Currencies, not only 1, as it is in SAP documentation.
Business case scenario is to reclassify balances only in Freely Defined Currencies in example from 1 - 4 only - just like in manual app "Post Currency Adjustments". 

Questions:

  1. Is it possible to extend or enhance JOURNALENTRYBULKCREATIONREQUEST_IN to support additional freely defined currencies? For example by adding new section for those currencies in WSDL / generated SOAP structure?
  2. Are there newer API versions/services that expose all configured freely defined currencies?
  3. Is this limitation expected by design?
  4. Would SAP recommend using another API/BAPI instead (for example BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST) for postings with multiple freely defined currencies?

I would appreciate any experience or recommendations from projects using multiple freely defined currencies with FI posting APIs.

Thanks!

entry.title: OT81 – Error message FIBL009 for cross country payments
entry.content:
Dear all,

 

with TC: OT81 we need to setup repetitive codes where paying company code and receiving company code are in different countries. The payment method to be used is only setup in the paying company code.

 

There’s error message FIBL009 indicating that the payment method is missing in the receiving company code. Despite the error message the repetitive code can be saved.

 

What is the purpose of the error message and how can it be omitted?

 

Regards

entry.title: Not able to close the project
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Ref: 374035/2026

while trying to replication the ABCO Transaction code, we are getting the error " Asset is investment measure, transaction type is not allowed". please find the attached screen shot for your reference and let us know we will connect and discuss on this issue.

entry.title: Issue with payment medium file download from DME
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Please find attached the document for reference.

We are facing an issue where, for one company code, the payment medium file is downloading successfully. However, for another company code, the system is showing an error when attempting to download the payment medium file from the DME. The error message displayed is: “No data record found.”

Kindly review the attached test case and advise on how we can resolve this issue and successfully download the .txt file from the DME.

while trying to replication the ABCO Transaction code, we are getting the error " Asset is investment measure, transaction type is not allowed". please find the attached screen shot for your reference and let us know.

Thanks,

Anji Babu

entry.title: Foreign currency valuation - FAGL_FCV (S4HANA 2023 Private cloud)
entry.content:
Dear experts, Please share your inputs to handle this situation.

This is regarding - FCV run for "GL account balances".

Requirement - FCV to run on only for Bank GL accounts but not all GL accounts.

Issue: FCV ran on all the GL accounts instead of bank GL accounts that leads incorrect postings

FCV run done from Jan to Dec 25 with these parameters.

company code = ABCD

Valuation method = A1

Key date = Month end date

Normal run - Update mode

GL account balances tab - shared the screenshot (Reverse posting not selected, GL range = blank, Selected valuate GL accounts)

Jan to Dec'25 > FCV ran (NORMAL RUN) was done by keeping Valuate GL account balances, GL ranges kept as blank (so all GL accounts took the run), Reverse posting check box not selected.

Later found its incorrect then ran Reset run with same parameters only for JAN, FEB and MARCH and it got reset correctly except some small difference of 3696/- difference in march25.

Then did run with reverse posting selected only for that GL account value 3696  and tried did not work, also tried with only required bank GL accounts in normal run and reset/reversal run with reverse posting tick and it leads to huge difference in PL account realized gain / loss account.

Now we have to rectify the entries since gain or loss account has huge balances.


configuration: no delta logic setup was done
Always evaluate is selected in configuration

 

highly appreciate immediate help. looking forward to hear. Thank you, Ganesh

entry.title: Enter rate MYR/EUR rate type M for 18.05.2026 in the system settings
entry.content:
Hello Expert, 

we got the below error in the VF01 "Enter rate MYR/EUR rate type M for 18.05.2026 in the system settings".

local currency MYR and the EUR is assgined as Ref currency in the OB07
now, try to post the invoice for MYR customer means documeny currency is MYR. whereas the PGI is posted with currency 2 as EUR. 
whereas the Billing is giving this errror?

With Regards,
Dwaraka

entry.title: Post difference between book depreciation and Tax depreciation values in S4
entry.content:
Post difference between book depreciation and Tax depreciation values

In ECC, we have set up a delta depreciation area for Finland that posts the difference between book depreciation and tax calculation to the special accounts (table T095P).

In S4 HANA, there is not possible to post the difference between book depreciation and tax calculation in a delta depreciation area. 

We can only create a Delta Depreciation area for informational values - strictly mathematically – and not posted. --> correct?


The comparison between US GAAP and TAX GAAP can be generated using report S_ALR_87012013 – Depreciation Comparison. However, this would require creating a manual journal entry. Our colleagues in Finland would like an automated solution that posts entries for each asset.

Is there a country-specific solution for Finland and France, or how can the process be mapped in S4?

Does anyone have any ideas about this?
many thanks

entry.title: Schedule automatic payment - Payment medium - Payment advice - F110
entry.content:
Hello,

In NOVA solution, the payment process steps are:

  • Parameters creation - Profile: Accounting payable
  • Proposal management : Profile: Accounting payable
    • With payment medium 
    • Without Payment advice We need to create the payment file at proposal level due to file validation process out of SAP
  • Payment run- Profile: Treasury 
    • Post payments
    • Create Payment advice
    • No creation for XML file again as already validated and sent to the Bank.

We have tried modifying the authorization settings
Proposal: Accounts Payable profile: assign activity 15 - Create a payment document
Payment cycle: Treasury profile: remove activity 25 - Do not create a payment document

How can we resolve th

entry.title: Delta depreciation area: Post difference between book depreciation and Tax depreciation values S4
entry.content:
Delta depreciation area: Post difference between book depreciation and Tax depreciation values S4

In ECC, we have set up a delta depreciation area for Finland that posts the difference between book depreciation and tax calculation to the special accounts (table T095P).

In S4 HANA, there is not possible to post the difference between book depreciation and tax calculation in a delta depreciation area.

We can only create a Delta Depreciation area for informational values - strictly mathematically – and not posted. --> correct?


The comparison between US GAAP and TAX GAAP can be generated using report S_ALR_87012013 – Depreciation Comparison. However, this would require creating a manual journal entry. Our colleagues in Finland would like an automated solution that posts entries for each asset.

Is there a country-specific solution for Finland and France, or how can the process be mapped in S4?

many thanks

entry.title: Arrears By Net Due Date different between FBL5H and FBL5N
entry.content: There is a difference of values in the 'Arrears by Net Due Date' field in FBL5H and FBL5N for the same open item. In FBL5N the value is zero. We would like to know how these values are getting fetched and is this an expected behavior.

entry.title: SAP Bank file issue
entry.content: In Sap Bank file generation, the requirement is to generate Two Spaces at the end of text file header, kindly suggest the feasibility.
